This caused...

IELTS Band 7.0+
中文: 这导致...
用法: 因果关系标记

Because of this...

IELTS Band 7.0+
中文: 因此...

However

IELTS Band 7.0+
中文: 然而

例句: (qualifying arguments)

Why was Edmund sent to prison?

情节细节

He was framed by his friend Montigue and others who made false charges against him

How many years was Edmund in prison?

情节细节

13 years (12 years before meeting Abbe, plus more time after)

Who was Abbe Faria?

角色

A prisoner from the floor below who became Edmund's mentor and friend

What did Abbe Faria teach Edmund?

情节细节

Swordsmanship, knowledge, and various skills during their time together

Where was the treasure hidden?

情节细节

In underwater chests on an island marked on the treasure map

Who were Edmund's three enemies?

角色

Montigue (his friend), Wilfford (the magistrate), and a third man who helped frame him

How did Edmund escape from prison?

情节细节

He swapped places with Abbe's dead body and was thrown into the sea

Who was Albert?

角色

Edmund's son with Mercedes, though raised believing Montigue was his father

How did Mercedes recognize Edmund?

情节细节

When he twisted her hair in a special way - something only he used to do

What happened to Montigue at the end?

情节细节

Edmund killed him in a sword fight after discovering Montigue's treasure was gone

What did Edmund do with the island prison?

情节细节

He bought it so no one else would have to suffer the pain he went through

Theme: Betrayal and Revenge

主题讨论

How betrayal by a trusted friend can transform a person and drive them to seek vengeance

Theme: Justice vs. Revenge

主题讨论

The moral complexity of seeking personal vengeance vs. trusting in legal justice

Theme: Identity and Transformation

主题讨论

How Edmund transforms from an innocent sailor to a wealthy avenger to a redeemed man

Theme: Hope and Despair

主题讨论

The psychological journey from despair in solitary confinement to hope through friendship

Theme: Redemption

主题讨论

How Edmund finds redemption by sparing Montigue's son and using wealth for good

What role did fate play in the story?

讨论问题

Open-ended: The tunnel coincidentally reaching Edmund's cell, perfect timing of escapes, etc.

Was Edmund's revenge justified?

讨论问题

Open-ended: Discuss justice, proportionality, moral complexity

How does the story explore corruption?

讨论问题

Open-ended: Corrupt magistrate, legal system abuse, power corrupting all three enemies

What does the story say about family?

讨论问题

Open-ended: Father dying of grief, Mercedes protecting Albert, Edmund reclaiming his family

Summary: The story in one sentence

理解测试

A sailor is falsely imprisoned, escapes with a mentor's help, finds treasure, and seeks revenge against those who betrayed him, ultimately finding redemption through love and forgiveness.

Why did the tunnel collapse?

理解测试

They were digging in the wrong direction and hit a weak point, causing stones and soil to fall on them

What was Abbe Faria's last wish?

理解测试

That Edmund would use the treasure for good and stay away from bad deeds

How did Edmund become the Count of Monte Cristo?

理解测试

He used the treasure to buy a luxurious house and presented himself as a French nobleman

Why did Edmund stage Albert's kidnapping?

理解测试

To appear as Albert's savior and gain access to Montigue's social circle for his revenge plan

How did Wilfford die?

理解测试

He was arrested after confessing to his crimes while police secretly listened

What was in Montigue's treasure chests?

理解测试

Sand - Edmund had secretly replaced the treasure with sand

How did Jacob show loyalty to Edmund?

理解测试

By saving his life during the fight and promising to remain loyal forever

What message does the story convey about revenge?

主题理解

That revenge can consume a person but redemption is possible through love, family, and using power for good

How long did it take Edmund to complete his revenge?

细节理解

Several years after his escape - time to find treasure, establish his identity, and carefully execute his plan

What role does the island prison play in the story's symbolism?

象征理解

It represents despair and suffering, but Edmund buying it shows breaking the cycle and transforming pain into good
